objective: Retry the 7B-class native checkpoint KV8/KV4 quality gate with memory-reduced dtype and bounded prompt/step defaults after v1 was killed with exit_code=-9.

decoder_contract.attention_kv_model_native_quality_7b_sco: Run a 7B-class trained checkpoint through teacher-forced decode while feeding back KV8/KV4-quantized past_key_values. The default checkpoint is a public native-GQA 7B-class model, but the evaluator may set RTLGEN_MODEL_NATIVE_7B_MODEL_ID and RTLGEN_MODEL_NATIVE_7B_EXPECTED_GQA_GROUP_SIZE to test an exact LLaMA-family or access-controlled checkpoint. This is a real-checkpoint precision gate, not PPA.

evaluation_record.title: Evaluate 7B-class native KV quantization quality
evaluation_record.primary_question: Does teacher-forced decode on a real 7B-class checkpoint preserve next-token rankings when past_key_values are quantized to KV8 or KV4?
evaluation_record.expected_reason: v1 was killed with exit_code=-9; r2 uses bfloat16 and smaller prompt/step defaults to produce a bounded 7B native precision signal.
evaluation_record.summary: Decoder native-checkpoint KV quality evidence recorded from runs/datasets/llm_decoder_eval_gpt2_prompt_stress_v1/decoder_attention_kv_model_native_quality_7b__l2_decoder_attention_kv_model_native_quality_7b_v1_r2.json: decision=native_checkpoint_kv4_promising; model_id=mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1; attention_heads=32; kv_heads=8; gqa_group_size=4.0; dtype=bfloat16; kv4_kv_bits=4; kv4_kv_granularity=tensor; kv4_top1_match_rate=1.0; kv4_topk_contains_rate=1.0; kv4_mean_logit_cosine=0.9978199414249704; kv4_mean_probability_kl=0.01678496644161117; kv4_max_abs_logit_delta_max=2.3125; next_step=Use this checkpoint evidence with the PPA model, then schedule a larger 7B-class or QAT confirmation.

proposal_assessment.title: Evaluate 7B-class native KV quantization quality
proposal_assessment.primary_question: Does teacher-forced decode on a real 7B-class checkpoint preserve next-token rankings when past_key_values are quantized to KV8 or KV4?
proposal_assessment.summary: Decoder native-checkpoint KV quality evidence recorded from runs/datasets/llm_decoder_eval_gpt2_prompt_stress_v1/decoder_attention_kv_model_native_quality_7b__l2_decoder_attention_kv_model_native_quality_7b_v1_r2.json: decision=native_checkpoint_kv4_promising; model_id=mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1; attention_heads=32; kv_heads=8; gqa_group_size=4.0; dtype=bfloat16; kv4_kv_bits=4; kv4_kv_granularity=tensor; kv4_top1_match_rate=1.0; kv4_topk_contains_rate=1.0; kv4_mean_logit_cosine=0.9978199414249704; kv4_mean_probability_kl=0.01678496644161117; kv4_max_abs_logit_delta_max=2.3125; next_step=Use this checkpoint evidence with the PPA model, then schedule a larger 7B-class or QAT confirmation.

assumptions: This is post-training native-checkpoint KV cache quantization, not QAT.
Teacher-forced reference tokens isolate KV-cache perturbation from divergent generated text.
The evaluator must have Hugging Face model access; generated model weights are not committed.
